description: You are a QA engineer configuring Talon Voice for hands-free code review workflows. Create a code review macro system in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\apps\github\ to facilitate approving PRs, leaving inline comments, navigating diff hunks, and toggling file trees. The system must include a github_review.talon file context-scoped to GitHub pull request URLs containing at least 6 multi-step voice commands utilizing key(), insert(), sleep(), and user-defined actions, and a github_review.py file defining at least 4 custom actions using the Talon Module/Context API, with at least 2 actions incorporating actions.sleep() for timing-sensitive UI interactions.
